prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业社会热度一般观望，金融/财经/经济类2024年评估为分化观望，大数据管理与应用属新兴交叉方向，热度上升。本省2026年高考报名总人数约48000人，物理类考生估算约30672人，较2025年（30457人）微增约0.7%，竞争略有加剧 。；北京外国语大学位于北京市，一线城市对理科考生吸引力较强。该校在青海省理科组招生仅2人，属极小规模投放，位 次波动易受个别高分考生填报行为影响；理科组招生专业较少，以语言类+少量交叉学科为主；2023年声誉评价偏 负面，小语种类专业录取位置明显下降；2026年声誉评价仍偏负面。抖音热度总排名第39位（较热），短视频曝光度中等偏上。历史投档异常方面，2023年小语种专业录取位次明 显下降，对理科组报考心理有滞后影响；外国语言文学A+为该校核心优势，理科组招生专业中英语、法语等语言类专业受益于此。金融学（数字金融）和大数据 管理与应用为交叉学科，依托学校语言+商科/数据科学复合培养。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (including physics category) were 1212 → 782 → 3690 → 1826 → 2450, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, there was a major drop (3690), rebounding to 1826 in 2024, with a baseline of approximately 2450 in 2025. The volatility has been high in the past three years, showing an overall oscillating upward trend and unstable competition. The enrollment plan for the science group in Qinghai Province: 4 in 2021, 3 in 2022, 2 in 2023, 2 in 2024, 2 in 2025, and 2 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with a very small enrollment size (only 2), making the ranking highly sensitive to minor plan adjustments.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, not a 985. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable in the 73–82 range in recent years, making it a nationally renowned top foreign language institution.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors is generally lukewarm. Finance/Economics/Business majors were assessed as divergent and watchful in 2024. Big Data Management and Application is an emerging interdisciplinary direction with rising popularity. The total number of Gaokao registrants in the province for 2026 is approximately 48,000, with physics category candidates estimated at about 30,672, a slight increase of about 0.7% from 2025 (30,457), leading to slightly intensified competition. Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city that is relatively attractive to science candidates. The university only enrolls 2 students in the science group in Qinghai Province, a very small-scale allocation, making rankings highly susceptible to individual high-scoring candidates' application behavior. The science group offers few majors, mainly language-based with a few interdisciplinary ones. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, with a noticeable decline in the admission positions of minor language majors. The reputation evaluation for 2026 remains somewhat negative. Douyin popularity ranks 39th overall (relatively popular), with medium-to-high short video exposure. In terms of historical admission anomalies, the admission positions for minor language majors dropped significantly in 2023, having a lagging psychological impact on science group applications. Foreign Language and Literature (A+) is the university's core strength, benefiting language majors like English and French in the science group. Finance (Digital Finance) and Big Data Management and Application are interdisciplinary fields, relying on the university's composite training in language plus business/data science.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2450, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in provincial candidates, the relatively cold popularity of foreign language majors, and the very small enrollment size of the science group, it is expected that the lowest ranking for the physics category in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 2480, with a ranking range of 2034–2926.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Big Data Management and Application
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 2034–2926, and the science group offers very few majors (only 2–3), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 2034), you can aim for Tier 1 language majors like English. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 2926), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors like Big Data Management and Application. Since BFSU enrolls very few students in the science group (only 2), the ranking fluctuation risk is high, so you should fully assess the uncertainty when applying.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were 312 → 453 → 1117 → 617 → 720, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. In 2023, there was a significant drop (1117th), rebounding to 617th in 2024, with a baseline of about 720th in 2025. The fluctuation range has been large in recent three years, but 2025 saw a slight decline compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts in Qinghai Province: 4 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 6 in 2024, 6 in 2025, and 6 in 2026. The 2026 plan remains unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having no direct impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, not a 985. Soft Science Chinese University Rankings: 82nd in 2021, 80th in 2022, 80th in 2023, 73rd in 2024, 82nd in 2025, and 79th in 2026, stable in the 73–82 range, making it a nationally renowned top foreign language institution. In 2023, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, with a noticeable decline in admission positions for minor language majors. In 2026, reputation evaluation remains somewhat negative, involving controversies such as academic fraud by a famous postgraduate tutor, which may negatively impact application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 39th overall (relatively hot), with high heat in 2024 and relatively hot in 2023, with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, but no obvious viral-level heat. Historical admission anomalies: in 2023, admission positions for minor language majors dropped significantly, indicating a low-concern anomaly signal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature was rated A+, the only A- or above discipline at the university. Majors such as English, German, French, Russian, Japanese, Communication Studies, Journalism and Communication, and Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages all belong to the first-level discipline of Foreign Language and Literature, with top national disciplinary strength. Majors like Business Administration, Law, and International Economics and Trade, though not A+ disciplines, benefit from the university's language advantages to form cross-disciplinary training features.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors in 2024 is assessed as generally wait-and-see, with overall stability and a cooling trend in language major application heat in recent years. Law major in 2024 is assessed as differentiated wait-and-see, and Journalism and Communication in 2023 is assessed as clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in this province is about 48,000, a slight increase of about 0.7% compared to 2025 (history category 17,212 + physics category 30,457 = 47,669), indicating slightly intensified competition. Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, which has a strong attraction for candidates from western provinces. The university's enrollment in Qinghai Province is very small (4–6 per year for liberal arts), accounting for a low proportion, making it a small-scale allocation in cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact from regional preference factors on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 720, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, slight increase in provincial candidates, stable and slightly cool popularity of foreign language majors, and somewhat negative university reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 735, with a ranking range of 603–867.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 603–867, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 603), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors like English (Country and Area Studies) and Law; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (around 867), prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. BFSU's Foreign Language and Literature A+ discipline is outstanding, with overall deep disciplinary heritage in language majors, but social popularity is relatively cool, making the application cost-performance ratio relatively high.
